response.overview: Set in 2014, while internet boom was just about to happen in India, WiFi is an innocent story of 4 teenagers that witness the changing dynamics of friendship and love. Things get unpleasant when “WiFi” becomes the reason for changing equations. 'WiFi' short film celebrates life, love, and friendship with a unique perspective with a universally resonating message.
response.title: WiFi

results.name: WiFi | Short Film | Cutting Fillum Entertainment
